# DEMO PRIORITY RULES

- This is a high-fidelity client presentation demo.
- Prioritize visible quality and complete user journeys.
- Do not create unnecessary enterprise infrastructure before the homepage is complete.
- Do not create empty directories to imitate the long-term architecture.
- Do not generate every possible detail page.
- Build reusable templates and populate representative examples.
- Do not replace premium layouts with common generic templates.
- Every phase must produce a visible and reviewable improvement.
- Use realistic, replaceable fictional demonstration content.
- Store clinic-specific details centrally.
- Never present fictional reviews, ratings, credentials, awards, or patient outcomes as authentic.
- Do not connect forms to production services unless explicitly configured.
- Preserve the ability to add a CMS and production backend later.
- Do not change unrelated approved work.
- Implement only the requested phase.
- Stop after the required completion report.

# UI QUALITY RULES

- The output must look custom-designed.
- Use intentional asymmetry.
- Maintain generous but purposeful whitespace.
- Avoid excessive empty space on mobile.
- Do not repeat identical cards throughout the site.
- Do not center every heading and paragraph.
- Do not overuse gradients, glass effects, pills, rounded containers, or shadows.
- Do not use low-contrast accent colors for body text.
- Do not place body text over busy imagery.
- Maintain one dominant CTA.
- Use media to strengthen visual storytelling.
- Give internal pages the same attention as the homepage.
- Preserve approved visual decisions unless explicitly instructed otherwise.

# RESPONSIVE RULES

- Begin with mobile behavior.
- Test every completed section at 320px.
- Do not merely shrink desktop layouts.
- Reorder content intentionally.
- Remove nonessential decoration when required.
- Use separate image cropping for mobile where appropriate.
- Prevent horizontal overflow.
- Ensure sticky actions do not obscure content or focused controls.
- Do not depend on hover for navigation or understanding.
- Validate keyboard and touch interaction.
